info.description: API Documentation for the Titik Nol Backend
info.title: Titik Nol API

get.description: Fetch all accounts belonging to the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new bank account or wallet for the authenticated user

put.description: Update details of a specific account by ID

delete.description: Soft delete a specific account by ID

get.description: Fetch all categories belonging to the authenticated user

post.description: Create multiple expense or income categories at once

get.description: Fetch financial summary for the authenticated user's dashboard

post.description: Create initial bank accounts during user onboarding

get.description: Fetch a paginated list of transactions with optional filters

post.description: Create a new expense, income, or transfer transaction

put.description: Update details of a specific transaction by ID

delete.description: Soft delete a specific transaction by ID

get.description: Fetch a paginated list of users

post.description: Create a new user with the provided details

put.description: Update the authenticated user's name or avatar

get.description: Fetch a single user by their UUID

post.description: Authenticate a user using Google OAuth token
Authenticate a user using email and password

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
